response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song title 'good enough' and artist '石川 舜平' from on-screen text. 2. Confirmed performers as 'flow glow' from Hololive official information. 3. Used search tool to find full original and English lyrics for 'good enough' by flow glow. 4. Verified lyrics and structured them into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video features a live 3D performance of the song 'good enough' by the hololive unit 'flow glow'. The performers are Riona Isaki, Niko Koganei, Su Mizumiya, Chihaya Rindo, and Vivi Kikirara. The song was written, composed, and arranged by Shuhei Ishikawa.

scenes.description: The video is a full vocal performance of the song 'good enough' by the hololive unit 'flow glow' (Riona Isaki, Niko Koganei, Su Mizumiya, Chihaya Rindo, Vivi Kikirara). Throughout the performance, the members dance and sing on stage with a large screen in the background showcasing various visuals, including close-ups of each member. Text on screen identifies the song as 'good enough' and the creator as Shuhei Ishikawa.
